Game.Name: Sougou Kakutougi - Astral Bout 2 - The Total Fighters (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Sougou Kakutougi: Astral Bout 2: The Total Fighters is the sequel to Sougou Kakutougi: Astral Bout and like that game features various martial arts experts competing, not unlike MMA. The game is based on a real-life Japanese martial arts TV promotion, Fighting Network Rings. The eight characters represent different martial arts, including wrestling, karate, boxing, Muay Thai and others.The game sits between Astral Bout and Astral Bout 3. None of the Astral Bout games ever left Japan.Cheat: Play as the boss charactersOn the "Battle Dimensions" mode character select screen, hold the L and R buttons while placing the cursor over Asuka then press select..Asuka's character sprite will now be changed to one of the hidden boss characters. Input the code again to alternate between the other two hidden boss characters.Cheat: Play as the boss charactersOn the menu screen
Game.Notes: Sougou Kakutougi: Astral Bout 2: The Total Fighters is the sequel to Sougou Kakutougi: Astral Bout and like that game features various martial arts experts competing, not unlike MMA. The game is based on a real-life Japanese martial arts TV promotion, Fighting Network Rings. The eight characters represent different martial arts, including wrestling, karate, boxing, Muay Thai and others.
